programmes.show_description: As Harry struggles to adapt to the reality of desert combat, Lois still longs to leave home. In Paris, Henriette is in grave danger, and a mysterious stranger arrives at Robina's.

Members of the local constabulary patrol the town of Ashfordly and the nearby village of Aidensfield, keeping the peace whilst also dealing with local loveable rogues.
The Good Witch meets her match when Cassie's long-lost college roommate, makes an unexpected visit to Grey House on a mission to disrupt Middleton's Halloween festivities.
From the planets most stunning state of the art structures to its mightiest modern machines, none would have been possible without the pioneering engineers of the past.
Ainsley is joined by chefs Tristan and Philli in the kitchen garden on the Wimpole Estate in Cambridgeshire for a friendly cooking contest
From monstrous sharks to killer catfish, his investigations are as varied and challenging as ever. Jeremy travels the world to uncover a range of underwater assassins.
Peter and his army of helpers will be surprising deserving people across the country with a stunning home makeover - performed in a day and brought to you in 60 minutes.
Police Constable Nick Rowan finds himself investigating a malicious whispering campaign against a local shopkeeper.

Alex Polizzi's continues on her quest to turn badly run hotels into profitable ventures.

An injured boxer causes concern for the staff and Dr Weatherill finds herself caught in an ethical battle when the parents of a dangerously ill baby refuse treatment.
Detective Superintendent Wycliffe heads an investigating team of officers brought in to solve the most intriguing of murder cases and uncovers a web of deceit and lies.

PC Nick Rowan investigates two mysterious barn fires and discovers that the sound of a motorcycle was heard on both occasions.
With Vigil in danger, Amy must fight to continue her investigation. Meanwhile Kirsten's enquiries lead to tragedy.
Helen Mirren returns again as Detective Superintendent Jane Tennison. Now transferred to the Greater Manchester Police, her reputation for fierce assertiveness precedes her.

Barnforth poses as a Water Board official and steals money in Mrs. Fairbride's tea caddy after sending her outside to keep flushing the outside toilet.
Merton and Jenny return early from honeymoon, and police are called out when other holiday makers come home to discover they have been burgled.

programmes.show_name: Paul O'Grady: For The Love Of Dogs
programmes.show_description: With exclusive access, Paul O'Grady follows life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home, as dedicated staff care for animals in need sharing heartbreaking stories and warm happy endings.

programmes.show_name: Paul O'Grady: For The Love Of Dogs
programmes.show_description: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs & Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals.
When moral crusader Joy Pettybon receives a death threat, Endeavour must protect her at all costs.
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the heartwarming series which aims to reunite people desperate to find their long lost relatives after years of separation.
Political strife in Belfast interferes with the construction of new liner Titanic, but White Star Line charmain Bruce Ismay is dismissive of designer Thomas Andrews' concerns.
Hotel Benidorm will take the viewers not only to one of the meds favourite towns, Benidorm, but also behind the scenes in one of the resort's most popular hotels.
Alex Polizzi, hospitality expert is embarking on a new venture of her own, in partnership with her hotelier and interior designer mother, Olga.
Starring John Simm as DS Roy Grace, these new feature-length films will see the tenacious detective doggedly pursuing the truth behind more of Brighton's most complex cases.
Two aspiring accountants discover their boss has been murdered and set out to convince everyone he is still alive. Slapstick comedy, starring Andrew McCarthy and Jonathan Silverman.
